Update Section

Manage return data, market-cap links, and portfolio settings from one protected place.

Unlocked
Protected Access

Unlock Update Section

Enter the dashboard password to edit returns, market-cap links, or portfolio inputs for this session.

Google Sheets Sync - Returns

Paste a normal Google Sheets share link or a direct CSV export link. Keep the first two columns as Stock Name and Daily Return (%).

✅ Sheet linked  ...T3BH1EvWwW9mE/edit?usp=sharing(gid 0)

Synced 748 stock returns from Google Sheets on 24 Apr 2026, 11:18 am. Auto-sync runs every 1 minute.

If the dashboard is opened directly as a local .html file, use the normal Google Sheets share link with Anyone with the link set to Viewer. If it still fails, open the dashboard through a small local server.

Google Sheets Sync - Portfolio

Paste a normal Google Sheets share link or a direct CSV export link. Use the portfolio sheet to update fund names, categories, and holdings together.

✅ Sheet linked  ...f0pWUETaRZvqE/edit?usp=sharing(gid 0)

Synced 1776 portfolio rows from Google Sheets on 24 Apr 2026, 11:17 am. Auto-sync runs every 1 minute.

If the dashboard is opened directly as a local .html file, use the normal Google Sheets share link with Anyone with the link set to Viewer. If it still fails, open the dashboard through a small local server.

Common Debt/Cash Return

Update the daily debt/cash return once here. The same rate is applied to every fund.

Editable Stock Return Sheet

Each line is prefilled as Stock Name<tab>Daily Return (%). Replace the returns, paste a fresh list from Excel, or copy the current list out for editing.

Clear Sheet only empties this editor. Live stock returns change only after you apply a new sheet.

Google Sheets Sync - Market Cap

Paste a normal Google Sheets share link or a direct CSV export link. Use columns such as Stock Name and Market Cap. The public market-cap section reads from this mapping sheet.

✅ Sheet linked  ...4FbbGgSJusz3s/edit?usp=sharing(gid 0)

Synced 754 market cap rows from Google Sheets on 24 Apr 2026, 11:17 am. Auto-sync runs every 1 minute.

The market-cap sheet can be a simple stock-to-bucket mapping. Missing stocks fall back to Unclassified.

Google Sheets Sync - Fund NAVs

Paste a normal Google Sheets share link or a direct CSV export link. You can use either Date, Fund Name, and NAV columns or a wide sheet with Date in the first column and each fund as its own NAV column.

✅ Sheet linked  ...ln3nBPxhTXOEc/edit?usp=sharing(gid 0)

Synced 11736 fund NAV rows from Google Sheets on 24 Apr 2026, 11:18 am. Matched 6 dashboard funds. Auto-sync runs every 1 minute.

Recommended Funds Return uses exact start and end dates from this NAV sheet. The calendar only enables dates that can produce at least one fund result.

Manage Categories

Flexi Cap 4 funds Default
Small Cap 3 funds Default
Focus 2 funds Default
ELSS 1 fund Default
Index Fund 4 funds Default
PMS 4 funds Default

Deleting a category immediately moves assigned funds to Uncategorized. Other sections update automatically.

Portfolio Bulk Sheet

Use one row per holding or one metadata-only row for an empty fund. Format: Portfolio Name<tab>Fund Name<tab>Category<tab>Stock Name<tab>ISIN<tab>Sector<tab>Weightage (%)<tab>Debt/Cash Weightage (%)

Edit Existing Fund

Add New Fund

Total Entries Check

Review the live counts that were moved out of the public section headers.

Total Funds 18 Funds available in Funds Return
Total Stocks 748 Stocks available in Stock List
Fund Market Cap 754 Mapped stocks available in Fund Market Cap
Portfolio Entries 1776 Entries available in Portfolio Details

Select existing funds and assign recommended portfolio weights. The public return section calculates only when selected weights total 100%.

Select which existing funds should appear in Recommended Funds Return. Date selection on the public section enables any NAV date available for at least one selected fund.
